title: Persons entitled to oppose
doc_html:
§263. Persons entitled to oppose

            Any person may make opposition to a marriage, but if the opposition is overruled, the party making it shall pay costs.

            Acts 1987, No. 886, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1988.
doc_text:
§263.  Persons entitled to oppose
Any person may make opposition to a marriage, but if the opposition is
overruled, the party making it shall pay costs.
Acts 1987, No. 886, §3, eff. Jan. 1, 1988.
